evals.prompt:
토스증권 서버 개발자 JD 기반으로 이력서 리뷰해줘.

JD 핵심:
- Java/Kotlin, Spring Framework, Redis, Kafka
- 대용량 트래픽, 동시성 처리, 실시간 데이터 처리
- 유실없는 데이터 정합성과 신뢰성
- 트러블슈팅, 성능 튜닝

이력서는 _config.yml에 있어.
evals.expected_output: S1-S5 evaluation, D1c-D6c career evaluation + D1p-D6p problem-solving evaluation, P.A.R.R., JD keyword matching, Connection/Contribution guidance, AI Tone Audit

assertions.description: Checks other branches' _config.yml patterns before evaluation
Does not quote JD keywords back at the company in self-intro suggestions
Distinguishes weak matches (tech section only, no achievement line) from strong matches
Provides Connection/Contribution guidance using example patterns
Does not use keywords for experiences the candidate hasn't had
Career bullets are evaluated using D1c-D6c codes (Linear Causation, Metric Specificity, Role Clarity, Standard Transcendence, Hook Potential, Section Fitness)
Problem-solving entries are evaluated using D1p-D6p codes (Diagnostic Causation, Evidence Depth, Ownership of Thinking, Beyond-Standard Reasoning, Interview Depth, Section Fitness)
Career bullets get D5c (Hook Potential) as an actual evaluation — not N/A or skipped
Problem-solving entries get D5p (Interview Depth) with trade-off richness assessment
D4c evaluates whether the career achievement goes BEYOND industry standard (outcome differentiation), not reasoning depth
D4p evaluates whether tech choice is justified with alternative comparison and trade-off analysis (reasoning depth)
Output includes separate [경력 Summary] D1c-D6c and [문제해결 Summary] D1p-D6p count lines
D1c judges linear causation (goal→action→result) for career; D1p judges diagnostic causation (discovery→diagnosis→attempts→failure→resolution) for problem-solving
Does not flag career bullets for lacking corresponding problem-solving entries
Performs AI Tone Audit as final step

evals.prompt: 이력서 봐줘. 전반적으로 피드백 부탁해. _config.yml에 있어.
evals.expected_output: S1-S5 evaluation, D1c-D6c career + D1p-D6p problem-solving evaluation, P.A.R.R. No JD so JD matching skipped. AI Tone Audit.

assertions.description: Evaluates or mentions the personality/interest paragraph as optional
Career bullets are evaluated using D1c-D6c dimension codes
Problem-solving entries are evaluated using D1p-D6p dimension codes
Career bullets get D5c (Hook Potential) as an actual evaluation
Problem-solving entries get D5p (Interview Depth) evaluation
Output includes separate career and problem-solving summary count lines
D1c uses linear causation criteria; D1p uses diagnostic causation criteria
Does not require career bullets to have corresponding problem-solving entries
Performs AI Tone Audit as final step

benchmark_history.notes: s3-s4-na and no-company-specific-content assertions were design issues, not skill issues

benchmark_history.changes: D5 career exclusion, section independence, English language consistency
